old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.7.1","title":"Enforce atomic Rust Path Sequence snapshots","description":"In Rust DaoManager, retain canonical per-target candidate snapshots (parent, Path Control, Path Lifetime) through freshness tombstones. A newer Path Sequence atomically replaces the complete set; equal sequence accepts only semantic equality without refreshing deadlines or target freshness; changed/older/incomparable updates reject before DAOSequence mutation. Keep non-/128 wire rejection.","acceptance_criteria":"Exact equal-sequence copies accept unchanged with newer DAOSequence but do not refresh route deadlines; additions/removals/lifetime/Path Control/withdrawal changes reject atomically; newer grouped multiparent snapshots replace fully; expiry/withdrawal tombstones prevent revival; Rust tests, clippy, and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:32:53.872085Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T21:32:53.872085Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.7.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:32:54.003347Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented and validated atomic complete-candidate Path Sequence snapshots in Rust, including exact-copy no-refresh semantics, bounded lifecycle state, expiry reporting, and node integration.
